title: Kits
excerpt: Thanks so much for all the kind words through various social media sent about my debut on HSN on Monday. I was nervous about being on live TV but so grateful for all the support! I'll be putting together a…
body:
Thanks so much for all the kind words through various social media sent about my debut on HSN on Monday. I was nervous about being on live TV but so grateful for all the support! I'll be putting together a wrap up post with photos soon!

Though the Project Life kit sold out fast, there are still some other fabulous kits left at a great price that you don't want to miss out on! The stamp and marker kit was featured as the Show Stopper - in case you missed it, you can see the footage here. The Embroidery Stencil kits are so versatile and can be used on a plethora of projects.

*********************************

Speaking of kits, Clique Kits is giving you the chance to win Debutante, a kit featuring plenty of items from Plus One!CLIQUE KITSClick. Connect. Create. Our kit philosophy is to feature a 'designer in the spotlight' each month adding our hand picked embellishments and our own exclusive designs to make a cohesive kit suitable for all formats of paper crafting/ scrapbooking in one box at an affordable price. Our mission is to build a community- "the clique" on our forum and social media where enthusiasts of this hobby can learn, socialize, and support one another. The four founding clique kits gals have a history associated with the former Memory Works company (now DBA Simple Stories) and are purveyors of supplies made in the US, Eco-friendly, and from small businesses and indie artists whenever possible. How are we different from other kit clubs? Our kits contain all premium product and no filler/fluff. For example, we feel that paper crafters already have the staples in their stash; solid card stock in their favorite colors, stamps, and other tools so if we focus on newly released paper products, and really special embellishments our kits will make up the foundation of multiple layouts and projects which we will inspire on the blog. Another difference is that we are not doing different kits for scrapbooking, project life, and cards. Our kits will have a combination of 12 x 12 card stock , cut-apart papers, and cards so that they are suitable for any format. We believe that our market will be intermediate to advanced level creatives who like to be current and trendy with products, styles, and techniques- we are not doing any pre-cut layouts or projects. We will be carrying Simple Stories products in our store and we may be selling our own embellishments separately on the website eventually.

To celebrate their launch, Clique Kits is giving away the Debutante kit to 1 lucky winner!

GIVEAWAY HAS CLOSED, Winner is #83 - Juliana Hall!

Thank you!Just leave a comment telling us one good thing. Winner will be selected and chosen on Friday, March 28 at 7am and contacted shortly after. Good luck!
